description.p: You choose a creature you can see within range and mystically mark it as your quarry. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d4 damage to the target whenever you hit it with a weapon attack, and you have advantage on any Wisdom (Perception) or Wisdom (Survival) check you make to find it. If the target drops to 0 hit points before this spell ends, you can use a bonus action on a subsequent turn of yours to mark a new creature.

element.name: Arcane Fever
element.supports: Wizard, Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Spell Saving Throw

description.p: You weaponize the thread of magic around your oponent.
Your target must make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. If they fail, they become dazed.

With the flick of the wrist, you make a tiny brown sphere appear in your hand. Its smell and taste are unappealing to most humanoids, but is quite appealing to most beasts. If a willing beast consumes this treat, you gain advantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks made with that beast for 1 minute. If after 1 minute the feed is not consumed, then it disappears.
Though flavourful, this feed is unable to satiate an animals hunger.

element.name: Erupting Geysers
element.supports: Wizard, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Spell Saving Throw

description.p: With the flick of the wrist, you make a tiny brown sphere appear in your hand. Its smell and taste are unappealing to most humanoids, but is quite appealing to most beasts. If a willing beast consumes this treat, you gain advantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks made with that beast for 1 minute. If after 1 minute the feed is not consumed, then it disappears.
Though flavourful, this feed is unable to satiate an animals hunger.
